creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rafan
Date: Sat May 17 12:25:51 2014
New Revision: 354317
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354317
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354317/

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.6
  - Reset maintainership as I have no intention to maintain this anymore
  
  PR:		ports/189011
  Submitted by:	Boris Samorodov <bsam at passap.ru>

Deleted:
  head/print/enscript-letter/files/
Modified:
  head/print/enscript-letter/Makefile
  head/print/enscript-letter/distinfo
  head/print/enscript-letter/pkg-descr
  head/print/enscript-letter/pkg-plist

Modified: head/print/enscript-letter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/enscript-letter/Makefile	Sat May 17 11:32:16 2014	(r354316)
+++ head/print/enscript-letter/Makefile	Sat May 17 12:25:51 2014	(r354317)
@@ -2,14 +2,13 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	enscript
-PORTVERSION=	1.6.4
-PORTREVISION=	6
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.6
 CATEGORIES+=	print
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.codento.com/people/mtr/genscript/
+MASTER_SITES=	GNU
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-${PAPERSIZE}
 DISTNAME=	enscript-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER?=	rafan@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER?=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	ASCII to PostScript filter
 
 USES=		shebangfix perl5
@@ -32,4 +31,7 @@ PS?=		Letter
 	@${FALSE}
 .endif
 
+post-configure:
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/bin/perl|$${prefix}/bin/perl|g' ${WRKSRC}/scripts/Makefile
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/print/enscript-letter/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/print/enscript-letter/distinfo	Sat May 17 11:32:16 2014	(r354316)
+++ head/print/enscript-letter/distinfo	Sat May 17 12:25:51 2014	(r354317)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (enscript-1.6.4.tar.gz) = 45299a4db47c9c08c3649d4f62b211ae79ef5143360c264a40371a728f6ad99b
-SIZE (enscript-1.6.4.tar.gz) = 1036734
+SHA256 (enscript-1.6.6.tar.gz) = 6d56bada6934d055b34b6c90399aa85975e66457ac5bf513427ae7fc77f5c0bb
+SIZE (enscript-1.6.6.tar.gz) = 1330493

Modified: head/print/enscript-letter/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/print/enscript-letter/pkg-descr	Sat May 17 11:32:16 2014	(r354316)
+++ head/print/enscript-letter/pkg-descr	Sat May 17 12:25:51 2014	(r354317)
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@ Input files in a number of programming l
 Tcl, and more, can optionally be pretty-printed instead of printed as
 plain-text.  Many printing options are available.
 
-WWW: http://www.codento.com/people/mtr/genscript/
+WWW: http://www.gnu.org/software/enscript/
